text.title: Contract Testing Consumer Driven Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Contract Testing Consumer Driven end-to-end and emit a contract-valid specification artefact.

step.name: check-preconditions
step.action: Walk the "Applies If" list in AGENTS.md. Every bullet must hold. Walk "Skip If" — any hit aborts.
step.decision-gate: If precondition_pass = false, STOP and emit conclusion ref="skip-this-methodology".

step.name: collect-typed-inputs
step.input: Prerequisites artefacts (parent context, owner roster, conventions)
step.action: Build the input set per rule r2-typed-input. Every input row carries name + source path or URL.
step.output: inputs_used list (≥1 entry, each typed + sourced)

step.name: synthesize-decision
step.action: Apply the rule set. Derive the specification fields. Cite each input by name in the rationale per rule r5-traceable-decision.

step.name: name-owner-and-version
step.action: Resolve owner to a named human / rotating role per rule r3-named-owner. Stamp version + last_reviewed per rule r4-versioned.
step.decision-gate: If owner is plural / generic, refuse to emit. Surface the gap to the operator.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-contract-testing-consumer-driven.py --file artefact.json`. On exit 0, publish to artefact store. On exit 1, fix and re-run.
